name: dcardenasl/ci4-api-core
description: DTO-first API foundation for CodeIgniter 4: base classes + CRUD scaffolding engine. Powers ci4-api-starter and ci4-domain-starter.

scripts.cs-check: @php -r "if (!file_exists('vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer')) { fwrite(STDERR, 'php-cs-fixer not installed. Run: composer require --dev friendsofphp/php-cs-fixer\n'); exit(1); }" && vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer fix --dry-run --diff --no-interaction
scripts.cs-fix: @php -r "if (!file_exists('vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer')) { fwrite(STDERR, 'php-cs-fixer not installed. Run: composer require --dev friendsofphp/php-cs-fixer\n'); exit(1); }" && vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer fix --no-interaction
